mapper.select: SELECT g.*, d.name as department_name, e.name as leader_name FROM `groups` g LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON g.leader_id = e.id ORDER BY g.display_order, g.id

SELECT g.*, d.name as department_name, e.name as leader_name FROM `groups` g LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON g.leader_id = e.id WHERE g.department_id = #{departmentId} ORDER BY g.display_order, g.id
SELECT g.*, d.name as department_name, e.name as leader_name FROM `groups` g LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON g.leader_id = e.id WHERE g.id = #{id}
SELECT g.*, d.name as department_name, e.name as leader_name FROM `groups` g LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON g.leader_id = e.id WHERE g.code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `groups` (department_id, code, name, description, leader_id, display_order, is_active) VALUES (#{departmentId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{leaderId}, #{displayOrder}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE `groups` SET department_id = #{departmentId}, code = #{code}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, leader_id = #{leaderId}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.employee_number as employeeNumber, e.name, e.email, e.phone, e.skill_set as skillSet, e.experience_years as experienceYears, e.experience_months as experienceMonths, e.employment_status as employmentStatus, e.group_id as groupId, e.created_at as createdAt, e.updated_at as updatedAt, g.name as groupName, d.name as departmentName FROM engineers e LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id WHERE e.group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY e.employee_number, e.name
